title: Coordination Config
description: Per-ticket cross-ticket phase dependency declarations. Lives in specs/{TICKET_ID}/coordination.json.

wait_for.description: Single dependency (object) or AND array. Object form is syntactic sugar for single-element array.

id.description: Ticket ID of the dependency (e.g., BRE-230)

phase.description: Phase ID that must appear in phase_history with _COMPLETE signal
